records.question: Which documents named Review on French files, dated on or before 1980-10-22 14:17:11, are linked to the Population Research project and have a CV type described as excellent with government expense details?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN projects ON documents.project_id = projects.project_id
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
JOIN documents_with_expenses ON documents.document_id = documents_with_expenses.document_id
WHERE ref_document_types.document_type_name = 'CV' AND ref_document_types.document_type_description = 'excellent' AND documents_with_expenses.document_details = 'government' AND projects.project_details = 'Population Research project' AND documents.document_date <= '1980-10-22 14:17:11' AND documents.document_name = 'Review on French files'
records.pred_sql: select documents.document_id from documents join projects on documents.project_id = projects.project_id join ref_document_types on documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code join documents_with_expenses on documents.document_id = documents_with_expenses.document_id where documents.document_name like '%review on french files%' and documents.document_date <= '1980-10-22 14:17:11' and projects.project_details like '%population research%' and ref_document_types.document_type_description like '%excellent%' and documents_with_expenses.document_details like '%government%' limit 5
records.thought: The query needs to find documents with name containing 'Review on French files', dated on or before 1980-10-22 14:17:11, linked to 'Population Research' project, with document type 'CV' described as 'excellent', and having government expense details.
